(flake 5') [...] its left [...] is bent back (and) its right horn is pointed, in Duʾuzu (month IV) on the [...] day [...]

(flake 6') [...] there will be barley and straw in the land. Epidemic of cattle. : ... [...].

(flake 8') [...] and its left horn is bent back (and) the Arrow approaches and ... [...].

flake 9'9'

⸢ina⸣ itiŠU U₄ 15-KAM AN.GE₆ GAR-ma ŠEG₃-MEŠ ina ANe ILLU ina [...]

(flake 9') (If) in Duʾuzu (IV) on the 15th day an eclipse takes place: rain from heaven and flood from [...] Lamassu. Catastrophe will take place in the land and cattle, flocks and livestock [...]. ... will devour. A king [...].

flake 10'10'

dLAMMA ka-šu₂-šu₂ ina KUR GAR-ma AB₂.GU₄-ḪI.A U₈.UDU-ḪI.A MAŠ₂.ANŠE [...]

flake 11'11'

ša₂* ŠUBUR GU₇ LUGAL [...]

flake 12'12'

GE₆-ma SI 15!-šu₂ ke-pat SI 2.30 ed-de-et* ina itiŠU [...]

(flake 12') (If) it is dark and its right horn is bent back (and) its left horn is pointed: in Duʾuzu [...] the king .. and .... the city ... ?of its land will be destroyed?. ... will appear and [...].
